basic_details.job_title: IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) has released the official Wellness Coordinator Recruitment 2026 notification. A total of 2 Wellness Coordinator vacancies have been announced under the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026. Candidates with a Bachelor's degree in Psychology (Master's degree in Psychology/ Clinical Psychology/ Counselling Psychology or a related field is preferred) are eligible to apply through Email on or before 27 July 2026. The official notification PDF and application details are provided below.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Psychology (Preferred: Master's degree in Psychology / Clinical Psychology / Counselling Psychology or related field)
qualification.details: Wellness Coordinator: Bachelor's degree in Psychology Master's degree in Psychology / Clinical Psychology / Counselling Psychology or related field (Preferred) Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in: Counselling services, or Mental health support, student wellness, or Clinical/ institutional psychology settings. Experience in educational institutions will be an added advantage.

salary_details.details: Wellness Coordinator: ₹ 55,000 per month (consolidated remuneration fixed)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Guwahati Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Wellness Coordinator: Bachelor's degree in Psychology Master's degree in Psychology / Clinical Psychology / Counselling Psychology or related field (Preferred) Minimum 3 years of relevant experience in: Counselling services, or Mental health support, student wellness, or Clinical/ institutional psychology settings. Experience in educational institutions will be an added advantage.

content_sections.text: Wellness Coordinator: ₹ 55,000 per month (consolidated remuneration fixed)

IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Guwahati Wellness Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Wellness Coordinator position at IIT Guwahati?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified email addresses before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Wellness Coordinator role?
faq.answer: A Bachelor's degree in Psychology is the minimum qualification. A Master's degree in Psychology, Clinical Psychology, or Counselling Psychology is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Wellness Coordinator post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the position of Wellness Coordinator at IIT Guwahati.

faq.question: Q4. What is the consolidated remuneration for the Wellness Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated remuneration of ₹ 55,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the required experience for this position?
faq.answer: A minimum of 3 years of relevant experience in counselling, mental health support, student wellness, or clinical/institutional psychology settings is required.

faq.question: Q6. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates need to apply via email by sending their CV, cover letter, and supporting documents to the provided email addresses.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Wellness Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a skill assessment followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any specific email addresses for submitting applications?
faq.answer: Yes, applications should be sent to both [email protected] and [email protected].

faq.question: Q9. What subject line should be used for the application email?
faq.answer: The subject line must be exactly: "Application for the Position (Contractual) of Wellness Coordinator".

faq.question: Q10. Is there any age limit mentioned for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any further details.
